'''Kuat's father''' held the position of [[Kuat of Kuat/Legends|Kuat of Kuat]] in the period in between [[Onara Kuat]] and his own son, [[Kuat (person)|Kuat of Kuat]].

==History==
Although Kuat's father's reign as head of the [[House Kuat|Kuat family]] and the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] appears to have been short, his words of advice were noted by his son during the latter's reign.

The man kept a low profile throughout his career, as Kuat of Kuat became a notable and influential Kuati even prior to his father's reign, opposing his aunt Onara when she attempted to have [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Giddean Danu/Legends|Giddean Danu]] ousted from office.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Mandalorian Armor]]'' {{1stm}}
